adjust_white_fabric_edge.query: before touching the heat-press handle, the worker uses both fingertips to make small local adjustments to the near edge of a white fabric item already lying flat on the right-hand worktable, without lifting or folding the item

raise_heat_press_handle.query: a worker lifts the orange-gripped handle of a heat press and opens the upper platen

remove_white_fabric_from_heat_press.query: after the upper platen is fully raised, the worker reaches under the open heat press, grasps the white fabric item rather than the orange handle, pulls it horizontally out from beneath the platen, carries it to the right-hand worktable, and spreads it flat

separate_white_fabric_from_stack.query: the worker reaches to the pile of white fabric items on the left, catches the near edge of the top item, peels that single item away from the stack, and continues lifting it until the separated fabric is held free in both hands

align_and_fold_white_fabric_on_table.query: a worker places a white fabric item on the center worktable, folds its sides, and aligns the edges with both hands
